stories.title: Profile export (JSON, PDF) and shareable links
stories.changes: Critical fix: buildProfileHTML in share.js had three distinct [object Object] root causes. (1) metadata loaded from profile/.metadata.json instead of DATA_DIR root. (2) metadata.student.firstName accessed instead of metadata.firstName per actual schema. (3) All profile section fields accessed at wrong nesting level — gpa, schoolName, courses, sat, act, achievements, activities, impact_statements all corrected. Added extractScalar() helper to unwrap citation objects safely.

notes: Patch release — critical share page fix. No breaking changes. No database migrations. No new dependencies.
